# Creator Space Fort Wayne

> Fort Wayne, Indiana's creative community directory. A free platform connecting local creators — videographers, photographers, designers, musicians, developers, audio engineers, animators, and more.

## What is Creator Space Fort Wayne?

Creator Space Fort Wayne is a community-built directory of creative professionals in Fort Wayne, Indiana. The platform helps local creators find each other, collaborate on projects, and grow together through free monthly meetups.

## Key Facts

- Location: Fort Wayne, Indiana, USA
- Website: https://creatorspacefw.com
- Cost: Free to join, free to use
- Directory: https://creatorspacefw.com/directory
- Categories: Video, Photo, Editor, VFX, Code, Music, Aerial, Design, Writing, Audio Engineering, Animation, Marketing, Business

## Who is this for?

- Creative professionals in the Fort Wayne area looking to network
- Businesses in Fort Wayne looking to hire local creative talent
- Anyone interested in Fort Wayne's creative community
- Creators looking for collaborators on projects

## How to find a creator

Visit https://creatorspacefw.com/directory to browse all creators. You can filter by skill category (Video, Photo, Design, Music, Code, etc.) or search by name, company, or skill.

## How to join

Sign up free at https://creatorspacefw.com/auth/signup to claim your spot in the directory. Add your skills, bio, portfolio links, and social media to your profile.

## Monthly meetups

Creator Space Fort Wayne hosts free monthly meetups for creators of all kinds. Events are open to anyone in the Fort Wayne creative community.

## Contact

Email: hello@creatorspacefw.com
